snippet.title: 科技產業關鍵對話 DIGITIMES創辦人黃欽勇 vs. Avnet CEO Phil Gallagher【花絮】
snippet.description:
2023年全球走過半導體產業鏈的「大缺料」，然而景氣快速修正，總體經濟包括通膨、升息等不確定性因素充斥，消費電子終端需求更顯疲軟。

中長期的黃金十年大勢，圍繞著「未來車」、「應用驅動」等明確趨勢，NVIDIA CEO黃仁勳一句「AI的iPhone時刻」到來，更讓全球科技業彷彿在迷霧之中看到曙光。

不過，庫存問題真的解決了嗎？長期的產業戰略又是什麼？走出台灣，需要怎樣的國際觀點？這不只是一場IC通路CEO與DIGITIMES創辦人的對話，更是資深半導體老將與資深分析師的專業交流。

#Dailyissue #Avnet #digitimes #科技業 #供應鏈 #電子零組件通路 #半導體 #產業趨勢 #產業鏈

snippet.title: How to Answer: Do You Have Any Questions in a Job Interview | Intellipaat #Interview #Shorts
snippet.description:
#HowtoAnswer #DoYouHaveAnyQuestions #JobInterview #InterviewQuestions #ShortsVideo #Intellipaat

In this video on “How to Answer: Do You Have Any Questions in a Job Interview” we’ll explain how asking questions in a job interview is an important part of the process.

 It demonstrates your interest in the job and shows that you have taken the time to prepare. Asking questions can also help you to learn more about the job and the company.

✅ What is the best answer to Do you have any questions in an interview?
Show interest in the interviewer's experience at the company by asking about their career path and what they enjoy most about working there. Remember, asking thoughtful questions demonstrates your genuine interest in the position and the company.

✅Do you have any questions for me in interview examples?
“Have you got any questions for us?” example questions
What does a typical day look like in this role?
What's the first priority in this role?
Who are the key stakeholders for this position?

✅What questions do I ask in an interview?
Common questions to ask about how your success will be evaluated
What are the most important things you'd like to see someone accomplish in the first 30, 60, and 90 days on the job?
What are the performance expectations of this position over the first 12 months?
What is the performance review process like here?
tags: Do You Have Any Questions in a Job Interview

snippet.title: Woman wakes up in the coffin at her funeral #shorts
snippet.description:
An Ecuadorian woman has risen from the 'dead' after almost being buried alive.

Shocking video footage shows the moment 76-year-old Bella Montoya was rescued from her coffin, after being stuck inside for over four hours.

The woman was declared deceased after suffering a stroke in hospital and taken to a local funeral home for preparations.

#BuriedAlive #Ecuador #BellaMontoya #Coffin #10NewsFirst

Don't miss this eye-opening episode that explores the allure of reality TV and the impact of unscripted experiences on both participants and viewers. #RealityTVSecrets, #NakedAndAfraid, #BehindTheScenes, #AuthenticityVsEntertainment, #SurvivalShow, #Controversies, #UnscriptedExperiences, #TVProduction, #IndustryInsiders, #RevealingJourney
